title: Orc Hunter negation returns linked Limited Summon

card.rawText: During your turn, you may Limited Summon 1 Common / Uncommon Beast-type creature from your hand, max 1. Return that creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

effect.value: During your turn, you may Limited Summon 1 Common / Uncommon Beast-type creature from your hand, max 1. Return that creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Orc Hunter negation returns linked Limited Summon

notes: Read text first: During your turn, you may Limited Summon 1 Common / Uncommon Beast-type creature from your hand, max 1. Return that creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.
